title: Flight endurance
text: The system shall provide at least 45 minutes of endurance under nominal daytime conditions.

title: Alert latency
text: The system shall classify and transmit hotspot alerts within 60 seconds of detection.

title: Link resilience
text: The system shall enter degraded mission mode within 5 seconds of LTE loss and preserve last known mission data.

title: Mission traceability
text: The system shall record operator commands, mission events, and generated alerts in a retrievable audit log.

title: Survey coverage
text: The system shall survey at least 25 square kilometers per sortie between 300 and 600 meters altitude.
